# Technical Implementation

**Summary**: Static-site architecture, scripts, runtime behavior, Netlify deployment, assets, and generated files.

**Sources**: package.json, netlify.toml, _redirects, scripts/build.js, scripts/generate-search-index.js, scripts/netlify-noindex-guard.js, assets/site.js, assets/js/contact.js, assets/js/booking-com.js, assets/js/search.js, new_styles.css, assets/css/rooms.css, NETLIFY.md.

**Last updated**: 2026-06-10.

---

The project is a static website published from the repository root, with Netlify configured to run `node scripts/netlify-noindex-guard.js` and publish `.` (source: netlify.toml). `_redirects` permanently redirects `/index.html` to `/` and `/fr/index.html` to `/fr/` (source: _redirects).

`package.json` exposes `generate-search-index`, `build`, and `update-domain` scripts, with `postcss`, `cssnano`, and `terser` listed as development dependencies (source: package.json). `scripts/build.js` copies files into `dist`, regenerates search indexes, and minifies CSS/JS using PostCSS/cssnano and Terser (source: scripts/build.js).

## Netlify And Indexing

The Netlify build command is only the noindex guard, not the full minifying build script (source: netlify.toml; source: scripts/build.js). The noindex guard skips local/non-Netlify runs, allows production indexing, and applies robots/header/meta noindex behavior in non-production or preprod contexts (source: scripts/netlify-noindex-guard.js; source: NETLIFY.md).

## Shared Runtime JavaScript

`assets/site.js` loads the correct menu and footer partials, handles the mobile menu, language switching, floating WhatsApp button, GTM/analytics consent, CTA tracking, contact-form tracking, cookie banner/modal, course toggles, mobile dive bar, sliders, and lightboxes (source: assets/site.js).

`assets/js/contact.js` manages conditional contact form fields and AJAX submission for the Netlify form (source: assets/js/contact.js). `assets/js/booking-com.js` builds Booking.com availability URLs from selected dates and stay type (source: assets/js/booking-com.js). `assets/js/search.js` renders site search from the generated index and site-content files (source: assets/js/search.js).

## Styling And Assets

`new_styles.css` is the main stylesheet and includes cookie banner/modal, contact form, Booking.com widget, footer, navigation, and many page-level styles (source: new_styles.css). `assets/css/rooms.css` contains room-specific layout and booking CTA styles (source: assets/css/rooms.css).

Images are organized under `assets/Pictures/` with many optimized WebP variants and page-specific folders for backgrounds, staff, rooms, dining, dive courses, fun dives, dive sites, Apo Island, blog, icons, logos, and other media (source: index.html; source: cottages.html; source: dining.html; source: diving.html; source: about.html).

## Generated Files

`assets/js/search-index-en.js` and `assets/js/search-index-fr.js` are generated by `scripts/generate-search-index.js` and should not be hand-edited for content changes (source: AGENTS.md; source: scripts/generate-search-index.js). The generator reads `assets/js/site-content-en.js` and `assets/js/site-content-fr.js`, extracts selected HTML page content, and writes language-specific search payloads (source: scripts/generate-search-index.js).
